name: Smoked Salmon & Greens Scramble
description: A savory, satisfying egg scramble with anti-inflammatory powerhouses — salmon, leafy greens, and healthy fats.
recipeInstructions: Warm olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add yellow onion and garlic, sauté until softened and fragrant.
Add cherry tomatoes and baby spinach to the pan. Stir until the greens are just wilted.
Whisk eggs with black pepper and pour into the pan. Stir gently over low heat until just set but still creamy.
Remove from heat. Fold in smoked salmon. Plate and top with diced avocado and fresh parsley.
